whyOSU: “Being recruited by Michael and Tanya was an experience truly like no other! They made me feel welcome and part of the family, starting from my very first call with them. I also got the privilege of meeting the team on my official visit and loved how incredibly welcoming and warm they all were towards me. We honestly have one of the best facilities I have ever seen for gymnastics, so that was a major bonus. In addition to the outstanding coaching staff and athletes, I appreciated all the resources offered to student-athletes. From the remarkable athletic trainers to the student advisors, I felt that Oregon State had everything and more to help me continue to grow as not only an athlete, but a person as well. For all these reasons and more, I made the decision to live out my lifelong dream of being a collegiate gymnast at Oregon State University.”
priorHistory: Trained under Mel Ruggiero, Tonya Way, Cleo Washington and Melissa Metcalf at Airborne Gymnastics
Third on bars, beam, and floor & second all-around at States in 2022
